name: libperlio-utf8-strict-perl
title: libperlio-utf8-strict-perl
summary: fast and correct UTF-8 Perl IO module
description:
fast and correct UTF-8 Perl IO module
PerlIO::utf8_strict provides a fast and correct UTF-8 PerlIO layer.
Unlike perl's default :utf8 layer it checks the input for correctness
and will croak if it finds an ill-formed UTF-8 octet sequence or
noncharacter code points not meant for interchange.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libperlio-utf8-strict-perl because fast and correct UTF-8 Perl IO module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libperlio-utf8-strict-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libperlio-utf8-strict-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libperlio-utf8-strict-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
